title: Pearl Detector
description: Detect when ender pearls are thrown and change how they are rendered! Now with wind charges!
body:
## Pearl Detector V2.5!

This mod plays sound cues when players throw wind charges and ender pearls, alongside providing tweaks to the scale and lighting of the projectiles. The sound cue will play if the projectile is within your sight as soon as it is thrown. Otherwise, no sound will be played.

If you really, really, want a version port to something like 1.21.8 just reach out in the support server

__You need MidnightLib to configure this mod.__ And no, it doesn't interfere with texture packs at all.

Huge thanks to PirateCow for commissioning this mod.
